info.title: OpenModex API
info.description: One API, 100+ AI models. OpenAI-compatible with intelligent routing, automatic fallbacks, and unified billing.

post.description: Creates a chat completion for the provided messages. Compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completions API format.

200.description: Chat completion response. When stream=true, returns SSE stream of ChatCompletionChunk objects.

post.description: Creates a text completion for the provided prompt. This is a legacy endpoint; prefer /chat/completions for new integrations.
Creates embedding vectors for the provided input text.

get.description: Lists all available models, including pricing, performance, and capability information.
Compare 2-4 models side by side across pricing, performance, quality, and capabilities.

parameters.name: models
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of model IDs to compare (2-4 models).

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific model by its ID.

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the model to retrieve.

post.description: Creates a message using the Anthropic Messages API format. Allows using Anthropic-style requests against any supported model.

BearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Pass your OpenModex API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer omx_sk_...`

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Anthropic-compatible API key authentication. Pass your OpenModex API key via the x-api-key header: `x-api-key: omx_sk_...`

ChatMessage.description: A message in the chat conversation.

role.description: The role of the message author.

name.description: An optional name for the participant.

tool_call_id.description: Tool call that this message is responding to (for role=tool).

tool_calls.description: Tool calls generated by the model (for role=assistant).

ToolCall.description: A tool call generated by the model.

id.description: The ID of the tool call.

type.description: The type of the tool call.

function.description: The function that the model called.

name.description: The name of the function to call.

arguments.description: The arguments to call the function with, as a JSON string.

Tool.description: A tool the model may call.

description.description: A description of what the function does.

parameters.description: The parameters the function accepts, described as a JSON Schema object.

fallback.description: Ordered list of fallback model IDs if the primary model is unavailable.

allow_upgrade.description: Whether to allow automatic upgrade to a more capable model if the requested model is unavailable.

enabled.description: Whether caching is enabled for this request.

CreateChatCompletionRequest.description: Request body for creating a chat completion.

model.description: ID of the model to use.

messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far.

stream.description: If true, partial message deltas will be sent as server-sent events.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Higher values make output more random.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Only consider tokens with top_p probability mass.

n.description: How many completions to generate for each prompt.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far.

presence_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.

logit_bias.description: Modify the likelihood of specified tokens appearing in the completion. Maps token IDs to bias values from -100 to 100.

tools.description: A list of tools the model may call.

tool_choice.description: Controls which tool is called by the model. Can be 'none', 'auto', 'required', or a specific tool object.

response_format.description: An object specifying the format the model must output (e.g., {"type": "json_object"}).

seed.description: If specified, the system will attempt to sample deterministically.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, for abuse monitoring.

ChatCompletionResponse.description: Response from a chat completion request.

id.description: A unique identifier for the completion.

created.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the completion was created.

model.description: The model used for the completion.

index.description: The index of the choice in the list.

message.description: The message generated by the model.

tool_calls.description: Tool calls generated by the model.

finish_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating tokens.

system_fingerprint.description: A fingerprint representing the backend configuration.

ChatCompletionChunk.description: A chunk of a streamed chat completion response.

id.description: A unique identifier for the completion.

created.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chunk was created.

model.description: The model used for the completion.

index.description: The index of the choice in the list.

delta.description: The delta content for this chunk.

finish_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating, or null if still streaming.

system_fingerprint.description: A fingerprint representing the backend configuration.

CreateCompletionRequest.description: Request body for creating a text completion (legacy).

model.description: ID of the model to use.

prompt.description: The prompt(s) to generate completions for.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate.

n.description: How many completions to generate for each prompt.

stream.description: Whether to stream back partial progress via SSE.

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text.

presence_penalty.description: Penalizes new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.

logit_bias.description: Modify the likelihood of specified tokens appearing in the completion.

suffix.description: The suffix that comes after a completion of inserted text.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user.

CompletionResponse.description: Response from a text completion request.

id.description: A unique identifier for the completion.

created.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the completion was created.

model.description: The model used for the completion.

finish_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating.

model.description: ID of the model to use.

input.description: Input text to embed. Can be a single string or an array of strings.

encoding_format.description: The format to return the embeddings in.

dimensions.description: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported by certain models.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user.

index.description: The index of the embedding in the list.

model.description: The model used to generate the embeddings.

usage.description: Usage statistics for the embedding request.

prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the input.

Model.description: Represents a model available through OpenModex.

name.description: The display name of the model.

description.description: A human-readable description of the model.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens the model can generate.

license.description: The license under which the model is available.

official_input_per_m.description: Official provider price per million input tokens (USD).

official_output_per_m.description: Official provider price per million output tokens (USD).

openmodex_input_per_m.description: OpenModex price per million input tokens (USD).

openmodex_output_per_m.description: OpenModex price per million output tokens (USD).

cached_input_per_m.description: Price per million cached input tokens (USD).

quality_scores.description: Quality benchmark scores for the model.

has_more.description: Whether there are more models available beyond this response.

models.description: The list of model IDs being compared.

additionalProperties.description: Comparison data for a specific model.

comparison.description: An object mapping each model ID to its comparison data including pricing, performance, and quality scores.

highlights.description: Highlights identifying the best model in each category.

cheapest.description: Model ID of the cheapest option.

fastest.description: Model ID of the fastest option.

best_quality.description: Model ID with the highest overall quality score.

best_code.description: Model ID with the highest code quality score.

longest_context.description: Model ID with the longest context window.

CreateMessageRequest.description: Request body for creating a message (Anthropic-compatible format).

model.description: ID of the model to use.

role.description: The role of the message author.

content.description: The content of the message. Can be a string or an array of content blocks.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate before stopping.

system.description: System prompt. Can be a string or an array of content blocks.

stream.description: Whether to stream the response using server-sent events.

stop_sequences.description: Custom text sequences that will cause the model to stop generating.

tools.description: Definitions of tools that the model may use.

description.description: A description of what the tool does.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters.

tool_choice.description: How the model should use the provided tools.

name.description: The name of the tool to use (when type is 'tool').

user_id.description: An external identifier for the user making the request.

MessageResponse.description: Response from the messages endpoint (Anthropic-compatible format).

role.description: The role of the generated message, always 'assistant'.

model.description: The model that handled the request.

stop_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating (e.g., 'end_turn', 'max_tokens', 'stop_sequence', 'tool_use').

stop_sequence.description: Which stop sequence was generated, if any.

cache_creation_input_tokens.description: Number of input tokens used to create a cache entry.

cache_read_input_tokens.description: Number of input tokens read from cache.

CompletionUsage.description: Token usage statistics for a completion request.

prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the generated completion.

total_tokens.description: Total number of tokens used (prompt + completion).

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost of the request in USD.

OpenModexMetadata.description: OpenModex-specific metadata included in completion responses.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for the request, useful for debugging and support.

model_used.description: The actual model that served the request (may differ from requested model if routing or fallback occurred).

provider.description: The provider that served the request.

cache_hit.description: Whether the response was served from cache.

routing_strategy.description: The routing strategy that was applied.

fallback_used.description: Whether a fallback model was used.

ErrorResponse.description: Error response returned by the API.

BadRequest.description: Bad request. The request was invalid or cannot be served.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing API key.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden. The API key does not have permission for the requested resource.

NotFound.description: Not found. The requested resource does not exist.

RateLimited.description: Too many requests. Rate limit exceeded.

BadGateway.description: Bad gateway. The upstream provider returned an invalid response.

ServiceUnavailable.description: Service unavailable. The upstream provider or service is temporarily unavailable.
